&nbsp;

<div align="center">

<img src="./public/favicon.svg" alt="Nova Logo" height="96" />

# Nova

</div>

&nbsp;

> »*uugh.. again?!*«<br />
> — lemon

**Nova** is an opinionated starter template for [Astro](https://astro.build). I've noticed that every time I created a new project I took the same steps over and over again to get started. Luckily Astro allows users to specify their own templates during the setup. Well.. and here we are: No more manual setup; It's all here by default!

Is Nova the right template for you? Most likely not.<br />
Can you use it anyway? You're more than welcome to.
💜

&nbsp;

## 🔨 Get started

```sh
pnpm create astro@latest --template unseen-ninja/nova
```

&nbsp;

## ✨ Features

* Integrates [MDX](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/integrations-guide/mdx/), a [Sitemap](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/integrations-guide/sitemap/) and [Icons](https://www.astroicon.dev/) ([Phosohor](https://phosphoricons.com/)) by default.
* Easy to use [component](/src/components/MetaData.astro) that handles meta-tags and embeds for SEO
* Responsive layout-skeleton

&nbsp;
